name: interactive-book-app
description: Fullscreen interactive book with configurable design, content, and update behavior.

scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run prepare:build-env && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron .
scripts.dev:admin: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run prepare:build-env && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron . --admin-server
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run prepare:build-env && cross-env NODE_ENV=production electron .
scripts.start:admin: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run prepare:build-env && cross-env NODE_ENV=production electron . --admin-server
scripts.pack: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run prepare:build-env && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run prepare:build-env && cross-env NODE_ENV=production CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder
